name: Zombowwow
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>腐</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>フ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>乱</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ラン</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>犬</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ケン</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: When this card declares an attack, it gains 500 ATK. If this card on the field is destroyed and sent to the Graveyard: You can Special Summon 1 Level 1 monster with 0 ATK and DEF from your Deck. Its effects are negated, also it is destroyed during your next End Phase.
mnst_eff: When this card declares an attack, it gains 500 ATK. If this card on the field is destroyed and sent to the Graveyard: You can Special Summon 1 Level 1 monster with 0 ATK and DEF from your Deck. Its effects are negated, also it is destroyed during your next End Phase.
eff: When this card declares an attack, it gains 500 ATK. If this card on the field is destroyed and sent to the Graveyard: You can Special Summon 1 Level 1 monster with 0 ATK and DEF from your Deck. Its effects are negated, also it is destroyed during your next End Phase.

mst: Negates the effects of the Summoned monsters
